input.background: A sample of 49 sudden infant death syndrome (SIDS) cases had a mean birth weight of 2998 grams. Based on other births in the county, we will assume σ=800 grams.
input.question: Interpret your results.

output.answer: Based on this sample, we have 95% confidence the population mean μ is between 2764 and 3212.

sample_mean_birth_weight.description: The mean birth weight of the sample of 49 sudden infant death syndrome (SIDS) cases.

population_std_dev.description: The assumed population standard deviation of birth weights based on other births in the county.

sample_size.description: The size of the sample of sudden infant death syndrome (SIDS) cases.

meta_info.caption: SIDS.
meta_info.section: 10.2 Confidence Intervals for $\mu$ When $\sigma$ Is Known
